name: Premium Cotton Tee
description: The ultimate white tee. Crafted from heavy 240gsm organic cotton for a structured drape that holds its shape. Available in White, Off-White, and Cream.

name: Heavyweight Boxy Tee
description: A relaxed, drop-shoulder fit in jet black. Pre-shrunk and garment dyed for a soft, worn-in feel.

name: Vintage Wash Graphic Tee
description: Inspired by 90s band merch, this tee features a cracked ink print and a subtle acid wash finish.

name: Striped Sailor Long Sleeve
description: Classic Breton stripes on soft jersey cotton. A versatile layering piece for transitional weather.

name: Distressed Blue Denim
description: Classic blue jeans featuring a relaxed fit and subtle distressed detailing on the knee.

name: Dark Wash Mom Jeans
description: High-waisted dark blue denim with a tapered leg for a flattering vintage silhouette.

name: Light Wash Straight Leg
description: Essential light blue jeans with a comfortable straight leg cut. Perfect for everyday wear.

name: Acid Wash Vintage Jeans
description: Statement acid wash denim with a retro 80s inspired look and relaxed fit.

name: Olive Green Chinos
description: Versatile olive green trousers made from soft cotton twill. A great alternative to denim.

name: Grey Stone Wash Jeans
description: Edgy grey stone wash denim with a slim-straight fit. Adds texture to any outfit.

name: Oversized Wool Blazer
description: Structured yet slouchy, this wool-blend blazer adds instant polish. Features padded shoulders and deep pockets.

name: Classic Denim Jacket
description: The timeless trucker jacket in a medium vintage wash. Durable, rugged, and gets better with age.

name: Suede Bomber Jacket
description: Luxurious genuine suede in a rich tan hue. Finished with ribbed cuffs and silver hardware.

name: Technical Shell Coat
description: A lightweight, waterproof parka shell designed for layering. Features a storm hood and sealed seams.

name: Minimalist Leather Sneaker
description: Handcrafted from full-grain white leather with a durable rubber cupsole. Clean lines for everyday wear.

name: Chunky Penny Loafer
description: A modern twist on a classic. Polished black leather with a substantial lug sole for added height and attitude.

name: Leather Chelsea Boot
description: Sleek ankle boots with elastic side panels and a pull tab. Made from premium Italian leather.

name: Canvas High Top
description: Vintage-inspired canvas trainers with a vulcanized rubber sole. The weekend essential.
